raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a {$960.00} charge for a purchase from XXXX ( Order # XXXX ) for a XXXX XXXX event on XX/XX/year>. This is a " Goods Not as Described '' claim involving a material bait-and-switch. I paid for premium XXXX XXXX XXXX, Row XXXX tickets. I instead received XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX tickets, which have a significantly lower market value. 

American Express is refusing to honor the dispute, claiming the merchant stated I did not contact them within the required 7-day timeframe. This is factually false. I contacted the merchant via phone on the night of the event ( XX/XX/XXXX ) and initiated a formal written dispute on XX/XX/XXXX, well within their 7-day window. I have provided Amex with proof of this contact, including emails from a XXXX executive representative named " XXXX, '' but Amex has failed to perform a proper human review of this merchant fraud and deception.
